## Type of Change

- [ ] Spec clarification (no behavior change) — PATCH
- [ ] Schema field addition (optional) — MINOR
- [ ] Schema field addition (required) or removal — MAJOR
- [ ] New compliance profile — MINOR
- [ ] New enum value — MINOR
- [ ] Conformance fixture — PATCH or MINOR
- [ ] Cedar policy / schema change — MINOR or MAJOR
- [ ] Reference implementation — MINOR
- [ ] Documentation / tooling — PATCH
